verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Your spirit is thirsty But the well has run dry Your heart has a hunger Like a famine inside There is a place of filling To nourish your soul If you need a refreshing There's only one place to go

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Come and dine at the master's table Let your soul be fed Come and feast on the good things Of what our Lord has said With the heavenly host of angels You'll find that company So take the time to come and dine For all eternity

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I've tasted of His goodness His everlasting peace And everyday His precious Word Is sweeter to me There is an invitation, Come one and come all! Join the celebration Just inside the banquet hall

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: "Come and dine!", The Master calleth, "Come and dine!" You may feast at Jesus' table all the time He who fed the multitude, turned the water into wine To the hungry, calleth now. .
